beats.label: story.read
beats.caption: Reading the story over MCP — story.read
beats.sub: the agent inspects the story source

chunks.data:
[35m●[0m story.read is workspace-scoped; I'll pass the barista dir and a relative path.

[32m⏺[0m [1mkitsoki[0m [90m-[0m [36mstory_read[0m [90m(MCP)[0m
  [90m⎿  app.yaml:[0m
  [90m# Barista — a tiny, fully-deterministic coffee-order story for a demo capture.[0m
  [90m#[0m
  [90m# NO LLM anywhere. Every intent is a plain room transition with NO slots, NO[0m
  [90m# agent/decide gates, NO host calls, and NO free-text routing. The whole story[0m
  [90m# is driven by DIRECT intents (submitted by name), so it can be replayed over[0m
  [90m# MCP `session.submit` with no model in the loop.[0m
  [90m#[0m
  [90m# Shape:[0m
  [90m#   lobby  --start_order-->  order[0m
  [90m#   order  --pick_flat_white--> confirm   (sets world.drink = "flat white")[0m
  [90m#   confirm --done-->        served       (terminal)[0m
  [90m#   confirm --order_another--> lobby      (clears world.drink)[0m
  [90m[0m
  [90mapp:[0m
  [90m  id: barista[0m
  [90m  version: 0.1.0[0m
  [90m… (story continues)[0m

[35m●[0m Manifest read — four direct intents (start_order, pick_flat_white, done, order_another) over a lobby→order→confirm→served graph. Step 2: validate the story.

[32m⏺[0m [1mkitsoki[0m [90m-[0m [36mstory_validate[0m [90m(MCP)[0m

  [90m [0m  [90m}[0m

[35m●[0m Valid with zero errors. Step 3: inspect the room graph.

  [90m [0m  [90m      "has_agent": false[0m
  [90m [0m  [90m… (+21 more)[0m

[35m●[0m Graph confirms the linear flow lobby(0)→order(1)→confirm(2)→served(3), no agents. Step 4: run the deterministic flow fixtures.

  [90m [0m  [90m    {[0m
  [90m [0m  [90m      "file": "/Users/brad/code/Kitsoki/.worktrees/mcp-studio/.artifacts/mcp-demo/c…[0m

beats.label: render.tui
beats.caption: Seeing the result — render.tui
beats.sub: the live kitsoki screen, as an operator sees it

chunks.data:
[35m●[0m Now in **confirm**, world `drink = "flat white"`. Step 7: render the current TUI screen for the confirm room.

[32m⏺[0m [1mkitsoki[0m [90m-[0m [36mrender_tui[0m [90m(MCP)[0m [90m→ live screen[0m
  One flat white, coming right up. Anything else?
  
  Your order
  
  Drink:  flat white
  Next:
  
  ▸ done           take it and go
    order another  go back and order another
    look           look at your order again
  
  [↑/↓ move • Enter pick • Tab chat • Esc cancel]
  ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  (picker active)
  confirm · Order confirmed — your flat white is ready.                                         normal

[35m●[0m TUI rendered — confirm room showing "Drink: flat white" and the done/order_another/look picker. Step 8: inspect the session's state, world, and allowed intents.

  [90m [0m  [90m    "ide": {[0m
  [90m [0m  [90m      "connected": false[0m
  [90m [0m  [90m    }[0m

beats.label: story.read

beats.sub: the agent inspects the story source

chunks.data:
[35m●[0m Inspect confirms state **confirm**, world `drink="flat white"`, intents done/look/order_another, with both direct transitions in history. Step 9: read `app.yaml` to get the manifest, then write it back with an updated title.

[32m⏺[0m [1mkitsoki[0m [90m-[0m [36mstory_read[0m [90m(MCP)[0m
  [90m⎿  app.yaml:[0m
  [90m# Barista — a tiny, fully-deterministic coffee-order story for a demo capture.[0m
  [90m#[0m
  [90m# NO LLM anywhere. Every intent is a plain room transition with NO slots, NO[0m
  [90m# agent/decide gates, NO host calls, and NO free-text routing. The whole story[0m
  [90m# is driven by DIRECT intents (submitted by name), so it can be replayed over[0m
  [90m# MCP `session.submit` with no model in the loop.[0m
  [90m#[0m
  [90m# Shape:[0m
  [90m#   lobby  --start_order-->  order[0m
  [90m#   order  --pick_flat_white--> confirm   (sets world.drink = "flat white")[0m
  [90m#   confirm --done-->        served       (terminal)[0m
  [90m#   confirm --order_another--> lobby      (clears world.drink)[0m
  [90m[0m
  [90mapp:[0m
  [90m  id: barista[0m
  [90m  version: 0.1.0[0m
  [90m… (story continues)[0m
